name: Global uniques
uniques: Triggers a [Based and Christpilled] event <after founding a religion> <upon turn end> <every [999] turns> <for [Human player] Civilizations>
Triggers a [National Birthday] event <for [Major] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <with [3]% chance>
Triggers a [Help from the guild] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn start> <when at war> <with [10]% chance>
Triggers a [Gift from the guild] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn start> <with [8]% chance>
Triggers a [Special day!] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn start> <with [9]% chance>
Triggers a [You're pregnat???] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn start> <with [8]% chance>
Triggers a [Conquer them!] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon declaring war on [All] Civilizations>
Triggers a [Vague posting] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <with [8]% chance>
Triggers a [Idk what is this] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <with [1]% chance>
Triggers a [The Guest Star in starry night] event <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <with [4]% chance>
Free [Ainz Ooal Gown] appears <Gain a free [Ainz War]> <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <after turn number [80]> <with [1]% chance> <if [Ainz Ooal Gown] is enabled>

Free [CZ2128 Delta] appears <Gain a free [CZ War] [in capital]> <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <before turn number [80]> <after turn number [50]> <with [3]% chance> <if [Ainz Ooal Gown] is enabled>
Free [Neia Baraja] appears <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <before turn number [50]> <after turn number [10]> <with [3]% chance> <if [Ainz Ooal Gown] is enabled>
Free [Oathbound (Free)] appears <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <before turn number [40]> <after turn number [1]> <with [4]% chance> <if [modFilter] is enabled>
Free [Sun Obelisk] appears <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <before turn number [60]> <after turn number [1]> <with [1]% chance> <if [modFilter] is enabled>
Free [Achilles] appears <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <before turn number [80]> <after turn number [1]> <with [3]% chance> <if [modFilter] is enabled>
Free [Orion] appears <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <before turn number [80]> <after turn number [15]> <with [3]% chance> <if [modFilter] is enabled>
Free [Agathinus] appears <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <before turn number [80]> <after turn number [30]> <with [3]% chance> <if [modFilter] is enabled>
Free [Daedalus] appears <for [Mercenary Empire] Civilizations> <upon turn end> <before turn number [80]> <after turn number [40]> <with [3]% chance> <if [modFilter] is enabled>
